# Design Portal

This portal is the complete architecture and delivery design package for the broker-integrated trading platform reference design.

## How To Use
1. Product and management start with `docs/design/01-requirements-and-slos.md`.
2. Engineering leads review `docs/design/02-c4-architecture.md` and `docs/design/03-domain-model.md`.
3. Service teams execute using `docs/design/teams/*.md`.
4. Operations use `docs/design/12-release-rollout-strategy.md` and runbooks.

## Core Design Areas
- System context and constraints
- C4 architecture and data flow
- Domain model and state machines
- Consistency and reconciliation model
- Security and threat model
- Capacity planning and reliability
- Release and incident response
- Team-by-team execution guides
- Source-of-truth governance and change control
